item: Brake flexible hose set front and rear
suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only if front/rear hose length, end fitting thread, and banjo style match J40 hard lines and wheel ends.
fitment_gate_before_payment: Measure old hoses eye-to-eye, fitting thread/pitch, and center hose lengths after final suspension ride height.

suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only if mount geometry matches the engine currently installed in this J40 (engine code must be confirmed on vehicle).
fitment_gate_before_payment: Match old mount bolt pattern, stud size, and installed height under load before payment.

item: Fuel-rated rubber hose and clamp kit
suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only with fuel-rated hose spec (SAE J30R7/J30R9 equivalent) plus correct ID for feed/return/vent; clamp-only listings are not enough.
fitment_gate_before_payment: Measure each fuel line run and confirm hose material spec before buying hose by length.

item: Gearbox top-cover service items (detents, bushes, shift-seat kit)
suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only when parts match actual gearbox top cover and shift mechanism variant installed in this vehicle.
fitment_gate_before_payment: Open top cover, capture gearbox code/casting and sample old detent/seat dimensions before quote confirmation.

item: Heat plugs (glow plugs) set - diesel engine (NEW only)
suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only if glow plug thread, reach, and voltage exactly match the diesel engine currently fitted; new parts only.
fitment_gate_before_payment: Read engine code from block and verify current plug part number before paying.

suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only when coolant/heater hose ID and bend radius match J40 heater circuit without kinking.
fitment_gate_before_payment: Measure heater core and engine-side nipple ODs; buy EPDM coolant-grade hose only.

suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only if radiator neck and cap pattern match and pressure spec is correct for your cooling system (typically 0.9 kg/cm2 / 88 kPa path used here).
fitment_gate_before_payment: ACTION: Verify radiator neck depth and cap ear style, then confirm cap family fitment before payment.

item: Radiator hose set upper plus lower with clamps
suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only when upper and lower hose diameters and bends match engine outlet/inlet and radiator neck positions.
fitment_gate_before_payment: Sample old hoses first and confirm no kink through full engine movement.

suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only if bush ID/OD/length exactly match worn steering linkage/relay locations on this J40.
fitment_gate_before_payment: Press out one old bush and measure dimensions before placing order.

item: Suspension Geometry Safety Pack (caster shims + brake hose length check)
suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable only after alignment readings; caster shim degree must be selected from measured caster/pinion angle and droop-hose checks.
fitment_gate_before_payment: Do alignment first, then choose shim degree and verify brake hose free length at full droop.

suitability_check_for_1978_j40: Suitable for vacuum circuits only when hose ID and heat rating match each vacuum line; do not substitute as fuel hose.
fitment_gate_before_payment: Map all vacuum lines and cut by measured runs; confirm each connection ID.
